name: Mint and Coriander Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and soak the tamarind in water for 30 minutes.
2. Clean and pick the coriander and mint, then wash them.
3. Separate the pulp from the tamarind and squeeze it out.
4. Grind the coriander, mint, green chili, and onion to a fine paste.
5. Add the tamarind pulp and salt.
6. Blend everything well until smooth.
7. Store in an airtight jar in the refrigerator for up to one week.
